texto: Make every day count... Even when you think it's the worst day of your life
autor: for you never know when it'll be your last.
explicacao: Citação de for you never know when it'll be your last. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Make every day count... Even when you think it's the worst day of your life” articula reflexao, solange-nicole, every em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
